title: bupleurum montanum
intro: Bupleurum montanum, also known as mountain bladderwort, is a flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum montanum include reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of the common cold and flu, and supporting liver health. Bupleurum montanum can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as dried roots, capsules, and teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
